name: QR Code Generator
description: Generate and manage QR codes with customizable styling
author: ahaas

enabled.label: Enable QR Codes
enabled.description: Enable or disable QR code generation

defaultForegroundColor.label: Default Foreground Color
defaultForegroundColor.description: Default color for QR code modules (hex format)

defaultBackgroundColor.label: Default Background Color
defaultBackgroundColor.description: Default background color for QR codes (hex format)

defaultErrorCorrection.label: Default Error Correction
defaultErrorCorrection.description: Default error correction level (L, M, Q, H)

defaultSize.label: Default Size
defaultSize.description: Default QR code size in pixels

defaultCornerShape.label: Default Corner Shape
defaultCornerShape.description: Default shape for position marker corners

defaultLogoUrl.label: Default Logo
defaultLogoUrl.description: Default logo to embed in QR codes (data URL or image URL)
